title: lathyrus albus
intro: Lathyrus albus, also known as the white pea or white vetch, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the legume family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a diuretic and to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Lathyrus albus can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the dried flowers or leaves in hot water, or used as a tincture, to make use of its medicinal properties.
